source_pr.title: util/admin: support admin check table on partition table
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/community/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->
* Support `admin check table` on the partition table. The `admin check table` doesn't take effect on the partition table before.

### What is changed and how it works?


### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test

Code changes

 - Has exported function/method change

Side effects

Related changes

 - Need to cherry-pick to the release branch

Release note

 - Support admin check table on the partition table

root_cause_explanation: The flakiness is due to a real data race on shared global state: the test directly mutated global config (`CheckMb4ValueInUTF8`) via `config.GetGlobalConfig()`, which can race with other concurrent tests under `-race`. The PR stabilizes it by copying the global config, updating the copy, and storing it back via `config.StoreGlobalConfig(...)` instead of mutating shared state in-place.
fix_pattern: Avoid in-place mutation of global config in tests: copy the global config, modify the copy, and store it back (and restore if needed) to prevent concurrent data races.

evidence: files: executor/admin_test.go, executor/builder.go, executor/distsql.go, executor/executor.go, planner/core/common_plans.go, planner/core/exhaust_physical_plans.go, planner/core/find_best_task.go, planner/core/planbuilder.go, util/admin/admin.go, executor/statement_context_test.go
